title: Waterproofing Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate how much waterproofing material you need for a bathroom, balcony, terrace, or foundation.
metaTitle: Waterproofing Calculator - Estimate Liquid Membrane Material
metaDescription: Calculate waterproofing quantity for floors, walls, balconies, terraces, and foundations. Enter area, coats, coverage, waste, and pack size to get packs needed.
intro: Use this waterproofing calculator to estimate how much liquid membrane, waterproofing compound, or sealant you need for your project. It is useful for bathrooms, balconies, terraces, and foundations.
overview: Enter the surface area, number of coats, coverage rate, waste allowance, and pack size. The calculator returns material needed without waste, total quantity with waste, and the number of packs to buy.
howItWorks: Multiply area by the number of coats.
Divide by the coverage rate to get base material quantity.
Add the waste percentage for a safer estimate.
Divide by pack size and round up to get packs needed.
useCases: Balcony and terrace liquid membrane planning.
Quick check for how much waterproofing compound to buy.

examples.title: Bathroom floor
examples.input: 10 m², 2 coats, 1 m²/kg coverage, 10% waste, 5 kg pack
examples.description: A practical estimate for a small bathroom floor.

examples.title: Terrace waterproofing
examples.input: 25 m², 2 coats, 0.8 m²/l coverage, 15% waste, 10 l pack
examples.description: Useful when planning outdoor waterproofing materials.

faq.question: What can I calculate with this tool?
faq.answer: You can estimate the amount of waterproofing material needed for bathrooms, balconies, terraces, and foundations.

faq.question: Does the calculator include waste?
faq.answer: Yes. Enter a waste percentage to get a more realistic total quantity.

faq.question: Should I round up the number of packs?
faq.answer: Yes. Always round up to ensure you have enough material for the whole job.

faq.question: Can I use it for liquid membrane?
faq.answer: Yes. It works well for liquid membrane and similar waterproofing products.

seo.title: Waterproofing Calculator for Liquid Membrane and Sealant
seo.description: Estimate waterproofing material quickly for bathrooms, balconies, terraces, and foundations. Calculate base quantity, total quantity with waste, and packs needed.
keywords: how much waterproofing do I need
